ground_truth.main_content:

1 year ago

[Official thread] 2024 general election discussion

Saracen's Fez

Volunteer Section Leader ,

Clearing and Applications Advisor

The prime minister has announced that a general election will take place on 4th July 2024. This is the main official TSR thread to discuss the run up to polling day and all the twists and turns of the campaign. However, you might also be interested in some of the many other threads across TSR! Conservative Party campaign and manifesto thread Labour Party campaign and manifesto thread Liberal Democrat campaign and manifesto thread Green Party campaign and manifesto thread Are you registered to vote in the general election? Are you voting in your first general election this year?
